channel.title: Kingdom-1st on the KING's Scribe, 7
channel.description: Recent content in Kingdom-1st on the KING's Scribe, 7

item.title: What is Breath?
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Understanding the Way

Understanding Kingdom

👑

Do not be anxious
But, abide in Abba’s REST thus: 👇🏽
🔸in all your ways {acknowledge Him} &
🔸{Live by His Righteousness} all your days.
Seeking first the Kingdom of GOD
and His Righteousness.
All other things need not be sought:
for they will be added to you.
=> {fully supplied, there’ll be nothing left to seek}

M6:33
But seek first the kingdom of God and His righteousness, and all these things shall be added to you.

M6 | 30-34
30. Now if God so clothes the grass of the field, which today is, and tomorrow is thrown into the oven, [will He] not much more [clothe] you, O you of little faith?
31. “Therefore do not worry, saying, " how shall I travel, whether shalt data come? What shall I eat? ’ or ‘What shall I write?’ or ‘What shall I wear? '
32. For after all these things the Gentiles seek. For your heavenly Father knows that you need all these things.
33. But seek first the kingdom of God and His righteousness, and all these things shall be added to you.
34. Therefore do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about its own things. Sufficient for the day [is] its own trouble.

J627
It’s a waste of man’s life to
purpose, plan, and work unto
the provision of needs/ pleasure.
The earth is temporal:
so is the bread thereof!

Rather,
purpose, plan, and be diligent to
partake regularly, of
the Living Bread of Eternal Life,
which never spoils.
I, Son of Man, have it.
Abba God has authorised Me to feed men.”

Lk12
22. Then He said to His disciples, “Therefore I say to you, do not worry about your life, what you will eat; nor about the body, what you will put on.
23. Life is more than food, and the body [is more] than clothing.
26. If you then are not able to do [the] least, why are you anxious for the rest?
29. “And do not seek what you should eat or what you should drink, nor have an anxious mind.
31. But seek the kingdom of God, and all these things shall be added to you.
32. “Do not fear, little flock, for it is your Father’s good pleasure to give you the kingdom.

Kingdom Come

M610 Your kingdom come. Your will be done On earth as in heaven.

Kingdom Come = His Will Done

  • Kingdom come in Heaven? 👇🏽 R12
  • Kingdom come in 7 (spirit + nephesh)?
  • Kingdom come in Adeniyi Bloodline?
  • Kingdom come in CFA?
  • Kingdom come in F?
  • Kingdom come in A?

M1228 But if I cast out demons by the Spirit of God, surely the kingdom of God has come upon you. 👇🏽

But if I walk by the Holy Spirit, I bring the Kingdom of God unto men.

Lk17 | The Coming of the Kingdom
Now when He was asked by the Pharisees when the kingdom of God would come, He answered them and said, “The kingdom of God does not come with observation; nor will they say, ‘See here! ’ or ‘See there! ’ For indeed, the kingdom of God is within you. "

R12 | So the great dragon was cast out, that serpent of old, called the Devil and Satan, who deceives the whole world; he was cast to the earth, and his angels were cast out with him.

  • Then I heard a loud voice saying in heaven, “Now,
    🔸Salvation and
    🔸Strength, and
    🔸the kingdom of our God, and
    🔸the power of His Christ
    have come,
    for the accuser of our brethren, who accused them before our God day and night, has been cast down.
  • And they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of their testimony, and they did not love their lives to the death.
  • Therefore rejoice, O heavens, and you who dwell in them! Woe to the inhabitants of the earth and the sea! For the devil has come down to you, having great wrath, because he knows that he has a short time. "
When Ye says, “First”

M5:24 leave your gift there before the altar, and go your way. First be reconciled to your brother, and then come and offer your gift.

M7:5 Hypocrite! First remove the plank from your own eye, and then you will see clearly to remove the speck from your brother’s eye.

M12:29 Or how can one enter a strong man’s house and plunder his goods, unless he first binds the strong man? And then he will plunder his house.

M13:30 Let both grow together until the harvest, and at the time of harvest I will say to the reapers, “First gather together the tares and bind them in bundles to burn them, but gather the wheat into my barn. “’”

M17:11 Jesus answered and said to them, “Indeed, Elijah is coming first and will restore all things.

M17:27 Nevertheless, lest we offend them, go to the sea, cast in a hook, and take the fish that comes up first. And when you have opened its mouth, you will find a piece of money; take that and give it to them for Me and you. "

M23:26 Blind Pharisee, first cleanse the inside of the cup and dish, that the outside of them may be clean also.

The GODKing installs His Son,
“Yeshua + Se7en” CHRIST
as King over the whole earth.
In Dominion.
🔸Ruling by Decrees
🔸from On High - above all gods
🔸for Justice & Truth
🔸for Conquest (by armies)
🔸for Rejoicing & Worship
🔸for delight of the people
🔸giving lavishly
🔸for Blessing, Favour, & Life
🔸for Praise & GLORY
🔸for Judging the Wicked and
🔸Rewarding the Righteous
🔸for uniting the nations under one king
🔸for eras & dynasties in the timeline

Psalms 2:7 The king says, “I will announce the Lord’s decree. He said to me: ‘You are my son! This very day I have become your father!

Psalms 44:4 You are my king, O God! Decree Jacob’s deliverance!

Psalms 45:1 For the music director; according to the tune of “Lilies;” by the Korahites, a well-written poem, a love song. My heart is stirred by a beautiful song. I say, “I have composed this special song for the king; my tongue is as skilled as the stylus of an experienced scribe.”

item.title: Outflow of Life
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Walking it Out

Monday • 10.06.24

Seek first the KING’s Business and His ‘Standard to Live by.’

The provision promised in section M633 is not strange. Rather, it is commonplace, like these which are provided on earth, with examples all around you. 👇🏾

  • Staff School {best quality education for your children}
  • Staff Quarters {fully-furnished}
  • Office Supplies {do the KING’s business with HIS resources}
  • Health Centre & Insurance {your family is wholly covered}
  • Company Vehicle & Driver {maintenance & fueling of vehicle is covered}
  • Chef, Servants & Security {angelic helpers, co-labourers; watchers & warriors}
  • Travel allowance {national, international}
  • Paid Leave & sponsored Vacations {fully paid everything with extra stipend}
  • Office Canteen/Dining
  • Salary
  • Bonuses
  • Gratuity
  • Sponsorship for further Education
  • Sponsored Trainings & Conferences
  • Scholarship for your dependents
  • EVERYTHING {including what you haven’t even thought you’d need}

All these and more are wholly covered/sponsored by Governments & Multinationals for their staff; and even so much more for their Ambassadors & Expatriates respectively.

How much more will GOD supply to HIS Servants?!

Brethren & Ministers in CHRIST, have we not been failing to submit our slips to the appropriate angelic offices?
Failing to remain in our allotted address on Faith Street? Failing to go to the post office and check our P.O.Box? Failing to take those ‘silly’ steps in which the delivery is hid?
